title: Berserk Dragonslayer
description: Changes The Mace Texture To An Anime Greatsword
body:
# Berserk Dragonslayer

## **About:**

_This resource pack transforms the mace into a massive, battle-worn greatsword, giving your gameplay a heavier, more heroic feel. The default model is replaced with a huge blade featuring detailed textures, subtle shading, and a polished fantasy aesthetic._

## **Features:**
- 256x
- Custom SFX
